summary: iOS | 5.0.1 | Free20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image missing from Home Screen after pairing Poly Voyager Free 20 with fresh app install
description_clean: After pairing Poly Voyager Free 20 with the mobile app (fresh install), the headset image is missing from the Home Screen. Expected: headset image should appear on the Home Screen.
steps: 1. Fresh install Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Pair the Poly Voyager Free 20 headset with the Android device via Bluetooth.
3. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
expected: The headset image for the Poly Voyager Free 20 should appear on the Home screen.
actual: The headset image is missing from the Home screen.
